title: manettia coccocypseloides var. coccocypseloides
intro: Manettia coccocypseloides var. coccocypseloides is a variety of the Manettia coccocypseloides plant, a flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is also known as Scarlet Lindera or Scarlet Lindera of the West Indies. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Manettia coccocypseloides var. coccocypseloides include its ability to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for consumption.
